description: 30-minute poll (Tier P1 — Pipeline / 4 streams). Pulls data-pipeline integration health: data export settings, Streaming API config, Intune connector status, Purview sharing config. Writes to MDE_DataExportSettings_CL, MDE_StreamingApiConfig_CL, MDE_IntuneConnection_CL, MDE_PurviewSharing_CL. Tier P1 = pipeline integration (mid-frequency).
